steps: Go to https://developer.withings.com/dashboard/ and sign in with your Withings account (or create one at https://account.withings.com/connectionuser/account_create)
In the developer dashboard, click 'Create Application'
Fill in your application name, description, and callback URL (redirect URI)
Select the data scopes your application needs (e.g. user.activity, user.metrics, user.sleepevents)
Submit the application — you will receive a Client ID and Client Secret
Use the authorization URL https://account.withings.com/oauth2_user/authorize2 to start the OAuth flow
Exchange the authorization code for tokens at https://wbsapi.withings.net/v2/oauth2

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your Withings OAuth application Client ID

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Withings OAuth application Client Secret

notes: A Withings device is required to have real health data — demo/test data may be available in sandbox mode
The Withings API uses a non-standard token refresh flow through the same endpoint as the API calls
OAuth scopes must be specified at app creation and during the authorization request
Withings provides a demo account for testing without a physical device
